scripts.deploy:sandbox: APP_ENV=sandbox SECRET_PROFILE=sandbox EXTRA_ENV_VARS=HH_USE_MOCK=true SERVICE=candidate-chatbot-sandbox DB_SECRET_ENV=DATABASE_URL DB_SECRET_NAME=SANDBOX_DATABASE_URL DEPLOY_PUBLIC_URL=${SANDBOX_URL:?SANDBOX_URL is required for deploy:sandbox} bash ./scripts/deploy.sh
scripts.test:hiring-agent: node --test tests/unit/hiring-agent-router.test.js tests/unit/hiring-agent-funnel-query.test.js tests/unit/hiring-agent-auth.test.js tests/unit/hiring-agent-runtime.test.js tests/unit/access-context.test.js tests/unit/playbook-context-interpolation.test.js tests/unit/hiring-agent-playbook-registry.test.js tests/unit/playbook-step-handlers.test.js tests/unit/playbook-runtime-fallback.test.js tests/integration/hiring-agent.test.js tests/integration/hiring-agent-funnel-adapter.test.js tests/integration/access-context-postgres.test.js tests/integration/hiring-agent-playbook-runtime.test.js
scripts.smoke:sandbox:cloud: BASE_URL=${SANDBOX_URL:?SANDBOX_URL is required for smoke:sandbox:cloud} node scripts/smoke-sandbox.js
scripts.smoke:moderation:cloud: BASE_URL=${BASE_URL:?BASE_URL is required for smoke:moderation:cloud} node scripts/smoke-moderation-report.js
scripts.smoke:moderation:auth: BASE_URL=${BASE_URL:?BASE_URL is required for smoke:moderation:auth} node scripts/smoke-moderation-report.js --check-page --format json
scripts.smoke:moderation:queue: BASE_URL=${BASE_URL:?BASE_URL is required for smoke:moderation:queue} node scripts/smoke-moderation-report.js --check-page --run-webhook --force-webhook --format json
scripts.smoke:moderation:block: BASE_URL=${BASE_URL:?BASE_URL is required for smoke:moderation:block} node scripts/smoke-moderation-report.js --check-page --run-webhook --force-webhook --action block --format json
scripts.smoke:moderation:send-now: BASE_URL=${BASE_URL:?BASE_URL is required for smoke:moderation:send-now} node scripts/smoke-moderation-report.js --check-page --run-webhook --force-webhook --action send-now --format json
scripts.smoke:moderation:drain: BASE_URL=${BASE_URL:?BASE_URL is required for smoke:moderation:drain} node scripts/smoke-moderation-drain.js --format json
